reviews.comment:
los playeros bien. el kiosco te cobra lo cigarrillos mas caros que el kiosco antes no era así. Tenes que hacer mucha cola para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants are fine. The kiosk charges more for cigarettes than it used to. You have to wait in a long line to get gas.

reviews.comment:
Es quiza la estacion de servicio mas lenta del pais. De 4 surtidores solo dos funcionando. No estaban recargando el combustible ni tampoco mantenimiento,  ni ninguna obra. Solo la cola para cargar es de 14 autos.

(Translated by Google)
It's perhaps the slowest gas station in the country. Of the four pumps, only two were working. They weren't refueling, nor were they doing any maintenance or construction. The line to fill up is 14 cars long.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLaXRTTlFBEAE
